zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne MacDonald於大約1380年出生時，她的父親Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles18歲，母親Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles17歲。她於1397年與Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne MacDonald于大约1380年出生时，她的父亲Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles18岁，母亲Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles17岁。她于1397年与Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne MacDonald was born about 1380, her father, Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles, was 18 and her mother, Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles, was 17. She married Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont in 1397, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne MacDonald est née environ 1380, son père, Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont en 1397, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne MacDonald um 1380 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles 18 und ihre Mutter Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles 17. Sie hat 1397 in Scotland Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne MacDonald è nata il circa 1380, sua padre, Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont nel 1397, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne MacDonaldが約1380年に生まれた時，父Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Islesは18歳，母Lady Mariota Leslie of the Islesは17歳であった。1397年にスコットランドでRobert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne MacDonald(이)가 대략 1380년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1397년 스컷랜드에서 Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne MacDonald nasceu aproximadamente 1380, seu pai, Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont em 1397, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne MacDonald родилась около 1380 г., её отцу по имени Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont в 1397 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne MacDonald nació aproximadamente 1380, su papá, Donald MacDonald of Harlaw, 8th Lord of the Isles, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Lady Mariota Leslie of the Isles, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont en 1397, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
